rulings.Case Title: REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. KEITH LAMONT MOORE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 10, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT KEITH MOORE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to December 31, 2018. Opposing party filed its opposition on December 5, 2018. Courtesy copies of opposition papers delivered to the department after noon on December 11, 2018 in violation of SFLR 2.7B(1). = (501/REQ)
